_comment: EDIT ME — periods below are placeholders based on the site's existing facts. Replace with your real history. Set resumeUrl to a PDF path in /public (e.g. "/Maulana-Yusup-Abdullah-CV.pdf") to show the Download CV button.

timeline.description: Designing and shipping my own products, developer tools, and interactive web apps — including Dibiku (database client), Neatly (code formatter), and a range of educational and browser experiences.

Delivered enterprise and client platforms with Vue.js, Laravel, and Node.js — including Honda Indonesia, BPOM, real-time systems (MyMeet), and e-learning (Dapur Ilmu). API integration, real-time features, and VPS deployment.
Early full-stack work: UI-to-HTML slicing, SPA development, third-party API integration, and server setup on Digital Ocean with Nginx and Redis.
